vi: Nay, toi mang truyen tranh cho ban.

en: So, uh, when are you done with those meetings? Like the week after I'm 21.
ja: 娘さんは元気？名前何だっけ？
zhTW: 你女兒怎麼樣？她叫什麼？
vi: Con gai ban the nao? Ten la gi?

en: Yeah? They gonna hook you up with a job or what?
ja: 分からない。母親とシカゴに住んでる。あまり会えない。
zhTW: 不知道。她跟她媽住在芝加哥。我不常見到她。
vi: Toi khong biet. Co be song voi me o Chicago. Toi khong gap nhieu.

en: Yeah, fuckin' sit in a room and do long division for the next 50 years.
ko: 그래, 다음 50년 동안 방에 앉아서 나눗셈이나 하게 된다면.
ja: ブリーフケースに何が入ってる？

en: Yeah, probably make some nice bank though.
vi: Toi dang tren duong ra san bay.

en: I'm gonna be a fuckin' lab rat. Better than this shit. Way out of here.
ja: ミネソタ中を荒らし回ってる。
vi: No dang hoat dong khap Minnesota.

en: What do I want a way out of here for? I mean, I'm gonna fuckin' live here the rest of my life.
vi: No lam chung toi dien dau.

en: You know, be neighbors, you know, we'll have little kids, fuckin' take them to Little League together up Foley Field.
vi: Ban co lay duoc sec khong?

en: Look, you're my best friend, so don't take this the wrong way, but in 20 years, if you're still living here,
ko: 너는 내 가장 친한 친구니까, 오해하지 마,
ja: ステンシルマシンとアンダーウッドを使ってるだけだ。
zhTW: 他只是用模版機和打字機。
vi: No chi dung may in khuon va may danh chu.

en: comin' over to my house to watch the Patriots game, still workin' construction, I'll fuckin' kill you.
ko: 내 집에 와서 패트리어츠 경기 보면서,
ja: 分からない。分からない。
vi: Toi khong biet. Toi khong biet.

en: That's not a threat. That's a fact. I'll fuckin' kill you. What the fuck are you talkin' about?
ko: 위협이 아니라, 사실이야. 널 죽일 거라고.
ja: 銀行に言えばいい。もう一回？
vi: Noi voi ngan hang. Noi lai?

en: Look, you got something none of us have.
ko: 너는 우리 중에 아무도 가진 게 없는 걸 가지고 있어.
ja: 銀行は日付にハンドスタンプを使うんだ。
zhTW: 銀行總是用手蓋章來標日期，看到了嗎？
vi: Ngan hang luon dung dau tay de dong ngay, thay khong?

en: Oh, come on. Why is it always this? I mean, I fuckin' owe it to myself to do this and that. What if I don't want to?
ja: 勘弁してよ。なんでいつもこうなの？自分にはこれをする義務があるとか。やりたくなかったら？
zhTW: 拜託。為什麼總是這樣？我欠自己要做這做那。如果我不想呢？
vi: Thoi di. Tai sao luc nao cung the? Toi no ban than phai lam cai nay cai kia. Neu toi khong muon thi sao?
